name: Vietnamese Rice Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cucumber, peeled and cut into small chunks
6 large cooked shrimp, peeled and deveined, sliced in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients for nouc cham together in a small bowl: 3 tablespoons fish sauce, 4 tablespoons rice vinegar, 1/3 cup warm water, 1 1/2 tablespoons sugar, chopped chili, minced garlic, and lime juice. Refrigerate for at least an hour before using.
2. To cook the rice noodles, soak them in boiling water for about 3 minutes.
3. To cook the shrimp, boil until just pink (about a minute or so). Cool under cold water to stop the cooking process.
4. Assemble each serving of salad by layering: place cucumbers at the bottom, followed by lettuce and bean sprouts. Add rice noodles, then shrimp on top. Pour nuoc cham over the salad.
